title: Stacked Blocks: Supplementaries
description: A compatibility mod for Stacked Blocks and Supplementaries.
body:
![Stacked Blocks: Supplementaries](https://i.imgur.com/dL7bDOD.png)
**Even soap can’t escape the compression!** This add-on for Stacked Blocks lets you compress blocks from **Supplementaries**, turning them into compact tied stacks for more efficient storage by using rope or lead. ## 🧺 Features - Compress blocks like Ash Bricks, Blackstone Tiles, Daub, and more using lead. Even the toughest blocks can get compacted. - Store Stacked Lapis Bricks and Stacked Soap Blocks while freeing up chest space. Who knew soap could clean up your storage? - Keep your builds neat with Stacked Stone Tiles and Checker Blocks. Now your base can be as organized as your inventory.
## ✨ Seamless Integration - Use lead or rope to craft tied stacks with ease. [Download Supplementaries here](https://modrinth.com/mod/supplementaries). [![Saving for a laptop!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/9rlXSyLg/images/491c87c96cd602ec45774ce0b0cb9fe4d25ba074.png)](https://paypal.me/kevgelhorn)
